# headerImageProvider

**Instance Property**

The header image to display.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var headerImageProvider: CLKFullColorImageProvider? { get set }
```

## Discussion

This image provider produces a full-color image.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **headerTextProvider**: The header text to display in the complication.
- **body1TextProvider**: The main body text to display in the complication.
- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge to display in the complication.
